---
title: "Blog about R/Shinny"
listing:
    id: id_Blog3
    contents: "Blogs/Blogs3/b*/*.qmd"
    type: default
    sort: "date"
    max-items: 15
    image-align: left
    image-placeholder: "Figures/noFigureMessage.jpg"
    date-format: long
    categories: true
    sort-ui: [title, date]
---
Here's a list of short projects, tutorials and guides related to R programming including Shinny Apps.

::: {#id_Blog3}
:::
